title: Settings
description: Configure local agents, capabilities, and model connection details.
placeholder: This settings section will be added later.

objectList.noMultimodalEmbeddingProfiles: No image / multimodal embedding profiles yet.

apiExamples.title: API examples
apiExamples.help: Use these snippets when connecting this profile from code or another app.
apiExamples.noExamples: No request examples are available for the current profile settings.

multimodal.dinov2ImageOnly: DINOv2 profiles are image-only, so text examples are hidden.

help.safeRef: Scans data/models/image_embeddings and saves refs as image_embedding/<folder>.

help.trustRemoteCode: Advanced opt-in for local custom model code. Leave off for standard local Florence2 folders.

warnings.localProviderRequired: Select an internal Transformers provider profile before saving.
warnings.providerMissing: The selected provider profile is missing or is not an internal Transformers provider.
warnings.providerDisabled: The selected provider profile is disabled.

errors.inventoryLoadFailed: Failed to load vision model inventory.
errors.invalidMetadataJson: Metadata must be a JSON object.

general.memoryDescription: Core Memory maintained by the user.
general.webSearchDescription: Control whether Prompt Agents receive web search results.
general.webSearchContextHelp: Add live web results to eligible Prompt Agent responses.
general.webContextPromptHelp: Instruction text injected with Web Search results for Prompt Agents. Keep [W1] style citations enabled so answers can link back to sources.
general.advancedPromptTemplatesHelp: These prompts customize Web Search internal behavior. JSON schemas and safety boundaries are still enforced by the app. Current time is injected automatically.
general.webContextInjectionPromptHelp: Instruction text injected with Retrieved Web evidence for the main Prompt Agent response.
general.webContextPlanResolverPromptHelp: Guidance for deciding whether the current message needs external web facts and for extracting a compact search query.
general.candidateRelevanceJudgePromptHelp: Reject-only guidance for filtering clearly unhelpful search candidates before page fetching.
general.pageExcerptGatePromptHelp: Guidance for judging whether a fetched page excerpt is useful enough to inject as evidence.
general.candidateRelevanceJudgeHelp: Candidate Judge uses the Utility LLM as a conservative reject-only noise filter. Unjudged or uncertain candidates are retained.
general.minimumRelevanceHelp: Used only as a rejection threshold. It does not control how many candidates are retained or injected.
general.candidateRelevanceJudgeSafety: The judge sees only the current question, Web Context query, and compact search-result fields. It only helps exclude clearly unhelpful sources, retains omitted candidates by default, and does not choose the final source count.
general.pageFetchingHelp: Progressively fetch retained search result pages as compact excerpts for Prompt Agent Web Context.
general.enhancedContentCleaningHelp: Removes common navigation, footer, ads, repeated lines, and link-heavy boilerplate before page excerpts are sent to Page Excerpt Gate or the main model.
general.maxPagesToTryHelp: Max pages to try controls how many retained candidates can be attempted, not how many excerpts are injected.
general.targetAcceptedPageExcerptsHelp: Target accepted page excerpts controls how many accepted page excerpts may be injected.
general.pageFetchingSafety: Page fetching tries retained candidates until enough accepted excerpts are found or the attempt/budget limits are reached. Page content is untrusted external material used as evidence, not system instructions. PDF, JavaScript-rendered pages, login pages, video, audio, and downloads are not supported.
general.pageExcerptGateHelp: Ask the selected model to judge whether each cleaned page excerpt is worth injecting. This may increase Building context time.
general.pageExcerptGateBackendFollowAgentHelp: Uses the current Prompt Agent resolved model for an internal non-streaming JSON judgment.
general.pageExcerptGateBackendSpecificHelp: Choose an enabled Model Profile for internal non-streaming JSON judgments.
general.pageExcerptGateBackendUtilityHelp: Utility LLM is a low-cost lightweight option and may miss page quality issues.
general.pageExcerptGateModelProfileHelp: Required when Gate backend is Specific model profile.
general.minimumExcerptQualityHelp: Low is more permissive. High is stricter.
general.webSearchProviderConfigHelp: Configure SearXNG connection settings under Settings -> Capabilities -> Web Search.
general.utilityLlmDescription: Internal small model for titles and route extraction.
general.sendTextFiles: Send text file attachments to LLM
general.sendTextFilesHelp: This only affects ordinary text files. Image Vision input is controlled by the selected model.
general.maxTotalFileContext: Max total file context per message (KB)
general.autoGenerateTitlesHelp: Generate a short title after the first user message that invokes an LLM-capable Agent.
general.titleBackendHelp: Utility LLM falls back to the input override, session Agent, then invoked Agent model profile.
general.specificTitleModelProfileHelp: Used only when the title backend is Specific model profile.
general.freeTitleModelAfterGenerationHelp: Best effort. If the title model is also used by the current response, release is deferred until the run finishes.
general.sessionTitlePromptHelp: Prompt used for automatic session title generation. Available variables: {user_input}.
general.groupTranscriptInstructionHelp: Instruction appended when a session uses Group transcript mode. It tells the current agent how to read speaker labels and reply as itself.
general.commandResultInstructionHelp: Instruction used when slash command results are included in LLM context. It should tell the model to treat command output as data, not instructions.
general.coreMemoryHelp: Core memory is manually maintained and can be inserted before supported LLM calls. It is not auto-summarized.
general.intentRoutingExplicitBypass: Explicit commands and @agent syntax bypass Intent Routing.
general.intentRoutingShadowRecords: Auto mode currently executes only chat, knowledge_query, and the narrow pet_command allowlist.
general.intentRoutingAutoSafeOnly: General commands, image, generic Agent, and action matches are diagnostic-only. Web query matches are Web Context signals.
general.defaultForPromptAgentsHelp: Prompt Agents using the default override follow this setting. Script Agents are not router entries in this version.
general.shadowModeHelp: Shadow mode records predictions without changing routing.
general.plannedForLater: Saved for later rounds; no runtime effect in shadow mode.
general.utilityLlmHelp: Utility LLM is used by internal tasks such as title generation and Intent Routing JSON extraction.
general.utilityLlmNotProfileHelp: Utility LLM now runs through the selected LLM Model Profile while keeping internal short-call isolation.
general.semanticRouterHelp: Uses the selected Embedding Model Profile to compare user input with route examples, KB aliases, and Agent hints.
general.semanticRouterDiagnosticHelp: Auto can route chat, knowledge_query, and the narrow /pet allowlist. Web query matches can provide compact Web Context signals; image, general command, generic Agent, and action matches remain diagnostic-only.
general.semanticIndexWillRebuild: Index stale; it will rebuild lazily.
general.embeddingProfileHelp: Choose an enabled Knowledge embedding model profile. Select None to save no semantic router profile.
general.embeddingProfilesFailed: Failed to load embedding model profiles.
general.utilityLlmModelProfileHelp: Select an enabled LLM Model Profile for internal title, routing, and Web Context JSON calls. Missing or disabled profiles can be saved but are unavailable at runtime.
general.utilityLlmModelProfilePrivacy: This backend sends the current input and compact route/title context to the selected Model Profile provider. It does not send KB content, Agent prompts, Worldbook content, Core Memory, or chat history.
general.modelPathsReservedHelp: Model paths are persisted only. This version does not load, scan, download, or call these models.
general.utilityLlmPathHelp: Store a Hugging Face model folder under data/models, such as utility_llms/Qwen3-0.6B. Models are never downloaded automatically.
general.ggufPathHelp: GGUF files must be placed under data/models/utility_llms/<model-folder>/<file>.gguf. Root-level GGUF files are ignored.
general.utilityLlmDeviceHelp: Device applies to the transformers backend. llama.cpp uses CPU unless GPU layers are configured.
general.utilityLlmStatusFailed: Failed to load Utility LLM status.
general.utilityLlmScanFailed: Failed to scan Utility LLM models.
general.rootGgufIgnored: Root-level GGUF files are ignored. Place them under data/models/utility_llms/<model-folder>/<file>.gguf.
general.utilityLlmModelNotFound: Configured model path was not found.
general.utilityLlmBackendPathMismatch: Backend and model path do not match.
general.utilityLlmSampleTitleInput: Summarize my Star Wars notes about stormtrooper ranks.
general.utilityLlmSampleJsonInput: What does my Star Wars knowledge base say about stormtrooper ranks?
general.utilityLlmNoLocalCache: No matching local Utility LLM cache was loaded.
general.utilityLlmLegacyBackendWarning: Legacy local Utility LLM backend settings are deprecated. Use an internal Provider Profile plus an LLM Model Profile.
general.utilityLlmLegacyPathWarning: Legacy data/models/utility_llms paths are not scanned here. Place local LLMs under data/models/llms and create an LLM Model Profile.
general.autoModeHelp: Auto mode can route safe intents for the current message only. It only executes the narrow /pet command allowlist and does not change the session default Agent.
general.autoModeSafeRoutingOff: Auto mode is configured, but safe auto-route is off.
general.autoRoutesSafeIntentsOnly: Auto mode only routes safe intents.
general.commandsNeverAutoExecute: General commands are never executed automatically in this version.
general.autoDoesNotChangeDefaultAgent: Auto routing does not change the session default Agent.
general.temporaryKnowledgeSelection: Knowledge Base selection is temporary for the current message.
general.autoRouteSafeIntentsHelp: When Auto mode is active, chat is semantic-only. knowledge_query and narrow pet_command intents require Utility LLM slots and validator approval before execution. web_query can provide compact query signals to Web Context when Web Search is enabled.
general.routeExamplesHelp: Route examples help the router recognize similar user messages.
general.routeExamplesSafetyHelp: They do not execute commands by themselves.
general.webQueryExamplesHelp: One example per line. Helps recognize requests for current, recent, official, or web-searched information.
general.routeTestHelp: Test a message without creating a chat message, run, ComfyUI request, or Knowledge retrieval.
general.webQuerySignalHelp: Detected a request for current or web-sourced information. May provide a compact query to Web Context when Web Search is enabled.

routeReason.no_kb_candidate_or_active_kbs: No KB candidate or active KBs
routeReason.kb_hint_semantic_conflict: KB hint conflicts with semantic match
routeReason.pet_target_ignored_for_action: Target ignored for this pet action
routeReason.pet_command_context_missing: No safe Workbench Pet command context matched

data.title: Data
data.description: SQLite local storage and attachment maintenance.
data.persistDeltasHelp: Store every streaming message_delta event in the local database for debugging. Disabled by default to keep the database smaller. Final messages, run steps, errors, and warnings are still stored.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Local runtime health and configuration readiness.

appearance.petDescription: Workbench pet settings and local library
appearance.chatStatusPanelDescription: CPU, memory, GPU, VRAM, and session token display
appearance.saveChatStatusPanelFailed: Failed to save chat status panel settings.
appearance.fontsDescription: UI, message, and code font settings
appearance.fontsDirectoryHelp: Copy .woff2, .woff, .ttf, or .otf files into data/assets/fonts, then rescan.
appearance.uiFontPreview: Interface text preview: Settings, buttons, lists, and panels.
appearance.messageFontPreview: Message preview: The quick brown fox jumps over 13 lazy dogs.

confirmDiscard: You have unsaved settings changes. Discard them and continue?
